subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Court of the All-Glorious! I beseech God to raise up from among the Persians souls who are free and devoted in servitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده بارگاه یزدان از خدا خواهم که از فارسیان آزادگانی برانگیزد که به بندگی
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
